---
title: "Tanacross: porphyry Cu-Mo-Au-Ag prospectivity from open data"
subtitle: "v1 demo — eastern Alaska"
execute:
  eval: false
---

::: {.callout-warning}
Stub. Day 1 of 7 — scaffolding only. Pipeline, model, maps, and prose arrive on Days 2–7.
:::

## Outline (to be filled in)

1. Why critical minerals, why porphyry Cu, why Alaska
2. Tanacross in context: the Taurus Cu-Mo-Au-Ag porphyry system
3. Data inventory: MRDS, ARDF, AGDB4, SGMC, USGS geophysics, Sentinel-2
4. The label problem: pseudo-negatives vs PU learning
5. Features and their geological justification
6. Baseline model: logistic regression + spatial CV
7. Main model: Random Forest + SHAP
8. External validation: Kenorland 2023–24 drill assays as a temporal holdout
9. Outputs: prospectivity raster, top-N target polygons, interactive map
10. Limits: what this does and doesn't prove
11. Next steps
